name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA for sharing confidential information between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, containing deal-specific fields.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud-hosted software services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access product partnerships.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime and support commitments.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) for consulting and service engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for GDPR-compliant data processing terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for business partnerships and reseller arrangements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for licensing software to customers.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited product trials and evaluations.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-compliant data handling.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum covering AI-specific terms for use with other agreements.
